description_long: This is a bag of Cheetos Baked Flamin' Hot snacks, featuring a vibrant red and white color scheme with bold black and yellow branding on the front. The front of the bag displays the Cheetos logo, the word 'BAKED' in large letters, and an image of the Flamin' Hot snack sticks with flames and a cartoon hand reaching for them. The packaging is a crinkled, flexible plastic bag with zigzag-cut edges at the top and bottom, typical of snack food bags. The back of the bag contains a detailed nutrition facts panel and additional product information, with smaller images of the snack. The sides of the bag are narrow and show the seam and partial graphics, emphasizing the bag's thin profile. The overall appearance is eye-catching and designed to attract attention in a retail or urban environment.
description: A crinkled red and white plastic bag of Cheetos Baked Flamin' Hot snacks with bold branding, flame graphics, and nutrition facts on the back.
description_view_0: The front view shows the Cheetos logo, 'BAKED' text, flame graphics, and an image of the Flamin' Hot snack sticks.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the narrow profile of the bag, with partial graphics and the seam visible.
description_view_2: The back view displays the nutrition facts panel, barcode, and additional product information, with a smaller image of the snack.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the other narrow edge of the bag, with partial branding and seam details.
attribute_brand_logo: The Cheetos brand logo is visible on the front and back, located near the top center, with yellow and white text outlined in black and orange.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front of the bag displays 'Flamin' Hot' text and flame graphics, indicating a spicy flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutrition facts panel is visible on the back, listing calories and other nutritional information.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A cartoon hand and flame graphics are present on the front, but no mascots, contests, or special offers are visible.
